Who This Is For

You have corporate exit energy. You are just not fully trusting it yet.

This session is not for everyone. It is for a specific kind of person at a specific kind of moment. Read these and notice whether they land.

You have achieved a lot and it still does not feel like enough. The career looks right on paper. Something inside does not agree.
You know you are capable of building something meaningful outside corporate. You do not yet fully trust yourself to do it.
The cost of staying is no longer abstract. You feel it at home, in your energy, in the things you are missing.
You are not in crisis. You are at a crossroads. And you know that if you do not move now, another year will pass the same way.
You have consumed the content, done some reflection, maybe even started planning. What you need now is not more information. It is the breakthrough.
You are ready to back yourself. You just need someone who has been where you are to help you trust that it is safe to move.

The Cost of Staying

Staying stuck is not neutral. It compounds.

Every year you stay in a role that does not feel like yours is a year you do not get back. The promotions come. The salary stays comfortable. And the quiet voice that says this is not it gets a little harder to ignore.

The people who wait for the perfect moment rarely find it. They find themselves five years further in, more anchored to the golden handcuffs, less connected to what they actually wanted.

The pain you feel right now is not a problem. It is a signal. The only question is whether you act on it.

What This Is

One day. Real change. A month of support to make it stick.

The Personal Breakthrough Session is not coaching in the usual sense. We do not talk about your situation from the outside. We go to the level where the real block lives: the belief that you cannot fully trust yourself to make the leap — and we clear it.

We surface the patterns that have been running your decisions, build your values into a filter you can actually use, and leave you with a 90-day plan that is concrete, specific, and yours.

You leave this session knowing what you want and trusting yourself to go after it. Not eventually. After this session.

The True North Method

Three phases. One month.

The session runs on the True North Method, a three-phase process built for senior leaders who know what they want but need the internal alignment to go after it.

Activate

You came into this knowing what you want.

We make sure you leave unable to settle for anything less. A compelling vision makes the wrong choices feel wrong before your head catches up.

Align

Your career is not your everything.

This phase makes sure everything else knows that too. Belief, values, the things that actually matter. When these are aligned, the right decision stops feeling impossible.

Ascend

You have been circling this decision.

After this you are moving. You leave clear, grounded, and in motion. The work you have done finally has somewhere to go.

Personal History: 60 to 90 mins  |  Breakthrough Session: 3 hrs  |  30 Day Support: 2x 50-min calls + WhatsApp

What You Walk Away With

Not just clarity. The momentum to actually move.

  • A vision so clear that the wrong choices become obvious before you say yes to them
  • Your top 5 values identified and built into a decision filter you can use immediately
  • The limiting beliefs that have been running your decisions surfaced, named, and cleared
  • A 90-day action plan built around your values. Concrete, executable, yours
  • The confidence to trust your own judgment again. Not eventually, after this session
  • 30 days of follow-through support so the breakthrough actually sticks

About Victor

I have been where you are. More than once.

7
Mental Health Spirals
6
Burnouts
18
Years in Corporate Banking

I burnt out 6 times and went through 7 mental health spirals before I built my own exit from 18 years in corporate banking. I know what the golden handcuffs feel like. I know what it costs to stay too long. And I know what it takes to actually trust yourself enough to leave.

The method I use is not from a textbook. It is the work I needed. I lived through the patterns first, built my way out, and now I help senior leaders do the same, without going through what I went through to get there.

Every client reminds me of the same truth. The capability has always been there. It just needs to be trusted.

Who This Is Not For

This session is not for everyone. And that is intentional.

The work is deep and the investment is real. It deserves to go to the right people.

·People who want tactical career coaching to stay in corporate and perform better
·People not ready to start moving within the next 90 days
·People who want someone to hand them a template or a shortcut
·People not open to deep inner work alongside practical planning
